title: Urea prices
full_text:
Urea rose to 585 USD/T on March 10, 2026, up 0.09% from the previous day. Over the past month, Urea's price has risen 29.71%, and is up 52.15% compared to the same time last year, according to trading on a contract for difference (CFD) that tracks the benchmark market for this commodity.
 
 
 

 Historically, Urea reached an all time high of 1050 in April of 2022. This page includes a chart with historical data for Urea. Urea - data, forecasts, historical chart - was last updated on March 12 of 2026.
 
 

Urea is expected to trade at 588.58 USD/T by the end of this quarter, according to Trading Economics global macro models and analysts expectations. Looking forward, we estimate it to trade at 667.23 in 12 months time.
